negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: common_sense_7a5402d9-c502-4658-9cbc-8a1bdd161abb
prompt: An outdoor sports video captures a cyclist performing a high jump on a rugged mountain trail. The cyclist, riding a dark bicycle and wearing black pants, a black and orange shirt, and a white helmet, executes a daring maneuver. The camera, using a fish-eye lens and panning to the right at a low angle, follows the cyclist as they soar through the air with the bike turned on its side. The cyclist maintains an almost horizontal position, their shadow boldly cast on the beige, rocky ground below. They leap over a small wooden wall made of gray logs and a short incline in the dirt road, with the camera continuing to pan with them. A light brown poster advertisement is embedded in the incline before the lip of the hill. As the cyclist turns their body and the bike, they land on the road wheels first, creating a cloud of dust. The camera transitions to an eye-level shot, focusing on the rider as they continue down the path. A drone flies across the top of the frame, changing direction to the right, while the camera remains focused on the cyclist with slight random movements. Before the cyclist is out of sight, they fall to their left, and the bike flips to the right. The camera quickly zooms in.  The scene is set against a backdrop of lush, green but rocky terrain with rolling hills and valleys. A dirt path cuts through a dense forest of trees leading to a ramp made of wooden slats. A rocky, grassy hill forms the background, dotted with small trees and spectators standing along the trail. Many spectators hold devices in their hands, capturing the event. In the foreground, a person with a camera stands hunched over, wearing a sandy hat and a black tank top. The sky is a deep blue with scattered clouds, adding to the scenic beauty of the setting.
